title: Xtra Bitter Irish Tomato Stew
description: A hearty and adventurous Irish stew featuring diced tomatoes and wok-hei, perfect for those who enjoy a bitter flavor profile, this dish is also dairy-free-friendly and has a unique glassy-jelly texture.
instructions: Heat the vegan butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender.
Add the diced tomatoes, bitter ale, vegetable broth, wok-hei oil, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the all-purpose flour to thicken the stew.
Continue to simmer the stew for an additional 10 minutes, or until it has reached the desired consistency.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
